---
name: Security Concern
about: Report a potential bypass or security improvement.
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: security
assignees: ''

---

**STOP!** If you are reporting a critical, actionable vulnerability, please follow [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) and email **security@zitpit.dev** (Placeholder) instead.

**Describe the concern**
A clear and concise description of the potential security risk or bypass you've identified.

**Proposed Mitigation**
If you have an idea of how to fix or mitigate the issue, please describe it.

**Context**
Add any other context, such as why this risk is particularly concerning for agentic workflows.
